title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What do you do to help protect the environment in your daily life?
Have you recently changed any habits to be more sustainable?
Do you think your generation cares more about the environment than previous ones?
How do you feel about using public transport instead of a car?
What environmental issue concerns you most?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think companies do enough to reduce their environmental impact?
Is it possible to live a completely sustainable life in today's world?
What can governments do to encourage individuals to make greener choices?
